description: Приведение проекта в соответствие с Техническим Заданием: ИИ-модель, расписание, парсинг, безопасность, деплой

userStories.title: Настроить модель суммаризации на Gemma 4 12B QAT
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the AI module to use the model specified in the TZ so that summarization quality matches requirements.
acceptanceCriteria: Default model in app/api/ai/client.ts and .env.example changed to gemma-4-12b-qat (or exact model ID from LM Studio)
docs/DEPLOY.md updated to mention Gemma 4 12B QAT instead of glm-4.6v-flash
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Updated default model to google/gemma-4-12b-qat in client.ts, .env.example, docker-compose.yml, docs/DEPLOY.md, docs/ADMIN_GUIDE.md, app/README.md, app/docs/DEPLOYMENT.md, app/.env.example. Also fixed pre-existing typecheck/lint errors blocking quality checks.

userStories.title: Исправить усечение подробного саммари
userStories.description: As a user, I want the detailed article summary to contain 10-15 sentences as required, not just the first paragraph.
acceptanceCriteria: Remove or make optional extractFirstParagraph for detailed summaries in app/api/ai/client.ts
Short summary still returns concise output (3-5 sentences)
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
userStories.notes: Made extractFirstParagraph optional via extractParagraph option in rawChatCompletion/chatCompletion. Short summary keeps extraction; detailed summary and translation return full text.

userStories.title: Переводить статьи через LM Studio вместо Bing
userStories.description: As a developer, I want batch translation to use the configured local LLM so that translation quality and privacy match the TZ.
acceptanceCriteria: app/api/agent/translateAgent.ts uses translateArticle() from app/api/ai/client.ts instead of translators Python subprocess
Remove or deprecate translateViaBing() and translateTitleViaBing()
Token and concurrency limits from env vars are respected
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Реализовать расписание парсинга по ТЗ
userStories.description: As an admin, I want parsing to run at 06:00 daily, science tools at 07:00, and additional parsing every 4 hours.
acceptanceCriteria: app/api/scheduler/index.ts registers three separate cron jobs: 0 6 * * *, 0 7 * * *, 0 */4 * * *
06:00 and every-4h jobs run the full pipeline
07:00 job runs parsing and processing only for science sources
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Извлекать дату публикации из HTML-источников
userStories.description: As a developer, I want HTML-parsed articles to have correct publishedAt so the feed is sorted properly.
acceptanceCriteria: app/api/agent/parseAgent.ts extracts publishedAt from common HTML meta tags
Falls back to current date if not found
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Улучшить определение языка статьи
userStories.description: As a developer, I want reliable language detection for non-English/Russian articles.
acceptanceCriteria: Replace Cyrillic/Latin heuristic with franc or cld3 library
Detect at least ru/en/de/es/zh/ja/fr
Add confidence threshold; fallback to unknown
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Применить maxArticles ко всем типам источников
userStories.description: As a developer, I want RSS and API sources to respect the per-source article limit.
acceptanceCriteria: fetchRssFeed returns at most maxArticles items
fetchApiArticles returns at most maxArticles items
HTML path already respects it; verify
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Добавить dedicated-логику для Google News
userStories.description: As a developer, I want Google News sources to be parsed correctly, not as generic RSS.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement fetchGoogleNews() in app/api/agent/parseAgent.ts
Handle Google News RSS/Atom specifics and topic feeds
Add at least one Google News source to seeds
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Защитить OAuth state от CSRF
userStories.description: As a security engineer, I want OAuth state to be a random CSRF token validated server-side.
acceptanceCriteria: app/api/kimi/auth.ts generates cryptographically random state and stores it
Callback validates state against stored value
Typecheck passes
Existing OAuth flow still works

userStories.title: Сократить срок жизни JWT и добавить инвалидацию сессий
userStories.description: As a security engineer, I want sessions to expire reasonably and logout to invalidate the token server-side.
acceptanceCriteria: JWT expiry reduced to 24 hours (configurable via env)
Server-side session blocklist or token versioning implemented
Logout invalidates the token
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Исправить nginx placeholder для домена
userStories.description: As a DevOps engineer, I want deploy.sh to correctly substitute the domain in nginx config.
acceptanceCriteria: Replace __DOMAIN__ with $DOMAIN in nginx/conf.d/default.conf OR update deploy.sh to replace __DOMAIN__ explicitly
deploy.sh still works after change
Nginx config syntax valid (nginx -t)

userStories.title: Прокинуть все env-переменные в docker-compose
userStories.description: As a DevOps engineer, I want the app container to receive all required environment variables.
acceptanceCriteria: docker-compose.yml forwards all variables used by the app or uses env_file: .env
CORS_ORIGIN defaults to a safe value, not *
LM_STUDIO_URL configurable, not hardcoded to host.docker.internal
docker-compose config is valid (docker compose config)

userStories.title: Добавить тесты для parseAgent
userStories.description: As a developer, I want parseAgent to have unit tests for key logic.
acceptanceCriteria: Create app/api/agent/parseAgent.test.ts
Cover: containsAiKeywords, detectLanguage, makeDecisions, deduplication
Tests pass

userStories.title: Добавить семантическую дедупликацию новостей
userStories.description: As a developer, I want duplicate articles with slightly different titles/URLs to be detected.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement content-based deduplication using URL normalization + title similarity
Integrate into runParseAgent() before insert
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Инициализировать git-репозиторий и добавить базовый CI
userStories.description: As a project maintainer, I want version control and automated checks.
acceptanceCriteria: git init in project root
.gitignore created/updated
Initial commit with current state
Add GitHub Actions workflow: typecheck, lint, test on PR/push
Workflow file valid
